name: Seafood Paella
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté onions and garlic in oil in a skillet until tender. Add rice and saffron, and continue to sauté for 5 more minutes. Stir in the bay leaf and 2 cups of broth, then simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
2. Add the remaining broth and shrimp, continuing to simmer for another 5 minutes. Then add clams and mussels, along with any additional broth needed. Cook until shells open (discard unopened shells).
3. Remove from heat, discard bay leaf, stir in pimenton and peas. Season with salt and pepper as desired before serving.
Calories: 449
Protein: 33.3g
Carbohydrates: 46.7g
Fat: 23.7g
Cholesterol: 158mg
Potassium: 675mg
Sodium: 649mg
